The '''RZ-52 Dekard transport''', otherwise known as the '''Consortium Light Transport''', was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
It was used to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] infantry and [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] between [[Planet/Legends|planets]], as well as board enemy starships.<ref name="FoC" />

==History==
A Dekard transport was used during the [[Battle for the Eclipse|Battle for the ''Eclipse'']] to board the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] so the Consortium could take control of it.<ref name="FoC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-24 -->[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
